title: Senior CloudOps Engineer
description:
Senior CloudOps EngineerThis role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.

**Who We Are:**

Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.

**Job Description:**

**Aruba** is an HPE Company, and a leading provider of next-generation network access solutions for the mobile enterprise. Helping some of the largest companies in the world modernize their networks to meet the demands of a digital future, Aruba is redefining the “Intelligent Edge” – and creating new customer experiences across intelligent spaces and digital workspaces. Join us redefine what’s next for you.

**What you'll do:**

We are looking for a Senior Cloud DevOps Engineer to design, build, and optimize secure, scalable, and efficient cloud infrastructure for a live cybersecurity SaaS product. You will take ownership of infrastructure designs, production reliability, and cloud cost optimization, while working closely with other senior technical teams.

**Key Responsibilities**
========================

* Design, implement, and optimize cloud infrastructure with a strong focus on scalability, security, and cost-efficiency.
* Build and maintain secure cloud networking infrastructure — including VPCs, subnets, routing, VPNs, firewalls, and load balancers.
* Develop Infrastructure as Code solutions using Terraform, Kubernetes, and Helm.
* Enhance CI/CD pipelines and deployment workflows (Argo CD) to support frequent production releases.
* Implement monitoring, alerting, and observability systems using Prometheus, Grafana, and logging tools.
* Troubleshoot and resolve complex production issues, ensuring high availability and customer satisfaction.
* Collaborate closely with development, security, and operations teams to integrate infrastructure with application needs.
* Contribute to cloud cost optimization initiatives by improving efficiency and resource usage.
* Maintain cloud security best practices and compliance with standards (e.g., SOC2, ISO27001).

**What you need to bring:**
===========================

* 7 - 10 years of experience in Cloud Infrastructure, DevOps, or SRE roles.
* Strong hands-on experience with AWS, Azure, and/or GCP, especially in networking (VPC setup, VPNs, routing, firewall configurations).
* Expertise in Terraform, Kubernetes, Helm, and scripting languages (Python or Bash).
* Proven experience supporting live, production SaaS environments.
* Solid understanding of cloud security concepts and practices.
* Strong troubleshooting skills in distributed, cloud-based environments.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills.

**Additional Skills:**

Cloud Architectures, Cross Domain Knowledge, Design Thinking, Development Fundamentals, DevOps, Distributed Computing, Microservices Fluency, Full Stack Development, Release Management, Security-First Mindset, User Experience (UX)

**What We Can Offer You:**

**Health & Wellbeing**

We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.

**Personal & Professional Development**

We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.

**Unconditional Inclusion**

We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.

**Let's Stay Connected:**

Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.

#india
#aruba

**Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.**

HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.

**Recruitment Fraud Alert**

We have become aware of an increase in fraudulent recruitment activities in which individuals impersonate our company or authorized recruitment agencies to offer fake employment opportunities. These scams may occur through false websites, emails, social media, or chat-based applications and often aim to obtain personal information or money. Please note that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), its direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliated companies, and its authorized recruitment agencies/vendors will never charge a candidate a registration fee, hiring fee, or any other fee in connection with its recruitment and hiring process. We also never request personal information such as back account details, Social Security numbers, or national IDs via social media or chat applications.

All legitimate job opportunities will come through official company channels, and candidates are responsible for verifying the credentials of any third party claiming to represent the company. Any reliance on fraudulent communication is at the individual’s own risk, and HPE disclaims legal liability for any resulting damages. If you suspect recruitment fraud, do not share personal information or make any payments and report the incident to your local authorities immediately.

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
**Job Title: DevOps Engineer**  
**Location:** Mumbai (On-site)- Client site  
**Experience:** 3–6 Years

**Job Summary**

We are looking for a skilled DevOps Engineer to join our team in Mumbai. The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience in managing on-premise and AWS cloud infrastructure, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and automation tools. The candidate will be responsible for ensuring the reliability, scalability, and security of our infrastructure and deployment processes.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Manage and maintain on-premise and AWS cloud environments.
* Deploy, configure, and manage Kubernetes clusters.
* Design, implement, and optimize CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins.
* Automate infrastructure provisioning and deployment processes.
* Monitor system performance, availability, and security.
* Troubleshoot infrastructure, deployment, and application-related issues.
* Collaborate with development and security teams to ensure smooth software releases.
* Implement backup, disaster recovery, and high-availability solutions.

**Required Skills**

* Strong experience with AWS services (EC2, VPC, IAM, S3, RDS, etc.).
* Hands-on experience with Kubernetes administration and container orchestration.
* Experience in building and managing CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins.
* Knowledge of Docker and containerization technologies.
* Experience managing Linux-based servers.
* Understanding of networking, security, and system administration concepts.
* Experience with infrastructure automation and scripting (Shell, Python, or similar).

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience with Terraform, Ansible, or other Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools.
* Knowledge of monitoring tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, or ELK Stack.
* AWS or Kubernetes certifications will be an added advantage.

**Location:** Mumbai (On-site)  
**Employment Type:** Full-Time

Pay: ₹398,430.46 - ₹1,616,155.81 per year

Work Location: In person

title: Service Engineer
description:
**About Us:**

HEMA ELECTRICAL is a leading Manufacturing company in Servo Voltage Stabilizers, Online UPS, Isolation Transformers, Distribution Transformers. We are committed to delivering high-quality products and exceptional customer service.

**Position Summary:**

We are seeking a highly motivated Service Engineer to join our team. The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background in electrical engineering and a passion for providing exceptional customer support.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Assemble and install stabilizers, ensuring proper functionality and compliance with safety standards.
* Wire various electrical components, devices, and systems according to schematics, diagrams, and specifications.
* Inspect and check voltage ranges to ensure optimal operation.
* Demonstrate a deep understanding of stabilizers, online UPS systems, and their applications.
* Provide prompt and efficient technical support to customers over the phone, and in person.
* Be prepared to travel to customer sites to provide on-site service and repairs as needed.

**Qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering or a related field.
* Minimum of 5-6 years of experience in electrical service or a similar role.
* Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
* Willingness to travel for field service assignments.

**Benefits:**

* Competitive salary and benefits package.
* Supportive and collaborative work environment.
* Opportunities for professional growth and development

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: ₹20,000.00 - ₹25,000.00 per month

Benefits:

* Paid sick time

Education:

* Bachelor's (Preferred)

Experience:

* total work: 1 year (Preferred)

Willingness to travel:

* 75% (Preferred)

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
DevOps Engineer

Company: Cryoflame Technologies

Location: Kalamassery, Kochi, Kerala

Job Type: Full-Time

Experience: 0–2 Years

Salary: ₹10,000 – ₹25,000 Per Month

About Us

Cryoflame Technologies is a growing IT solutions company specializing in Software Development, Mobile Application Development, Web Development, Cloud Solutions, Digital Marketing, and Creative Media Services. We are committed to delivering scalable, secure, and high-performance digital solutions to businesses across various industries.

Job Overview

We are looking for a motivated and enthusiastic DevOps Engineer to join our technical team. The ideal candidate should have a basic understanding of cloud infrastructure, deployment processes, CI/CD pipelines, server management, and automation tools. This role is ideal for freshers and junior professionals looking to build a career in DevOps and Cloud Engineering.

Roles and Responsibilities

\\* Assist in deploying and maintaining web and mobile applications on cloud platforms.

\\* Monitor server performance, application uptime, and infrastructure health.

\\* Configure and manage Linux-based servers.

\\* Support the implementation and maintenance of CI/CD pipelines.

\\* Collaborate with development teams to streamline deployment processes.

\\* Manage source code repositories and version control systems.

\\* Assist in infrastructure automation and configuration management.

\\* Monitor logs, troubleshoot issues, and resolve deployment-related problems.

\\* Implement security best practices for servers and applications.

\\* Perform regular backups and disaster recovery procedures.

\\* Document deployment processes, server configurations, and operational procedures.

\\* Stay updated with the latest DevOps tools, technologies, and best practices.

Required Skills

\\* Linux Administration Fundamentals

\\* Git & GitHub

\\* Basic Networking Concepts

\\* Cloud Computing Fundamentals

\\* Shell Scripting / Bash

\\* CI/CD Concepts

\\* Docker Fundamentals

\\* Server Monitoring & Troubleshooting

\\* Problem-Solving Skills

\\* System Administration Basics

Preferred Skills

\\* AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform

\\* Docker & Docker Compose

\\* Kubernetes Fundamentals

\\* Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or GitLab CI/CD

\\* Nginx or Apache Server Management

\\* Terraform Basics

\\* SSL Certificate Management

\\* DNS and Domain Management

\\* Database Backup & Recovery

\\* Monitoring Tools (Prometheus, Grafana, etc.)

\\* Python or Bash Scripting

Educational Qualifications

\\* BCA / MCA

\\* B.Tech / M.Tech

\\* B.Sc / M.Sc Computer Science

\\* Information Technology or related field

Freshers with DevOps, Linux Administration, Cloud Computing, or System Administration projects, internships, or certifications are encouraged to apply.

What We Offer

\\* Competitive salary package based on skills and experience.

\\* Opportunity to work on real-world cloud and infrastructure projects.

\\* Exposure to modern DevOps tools and technologies.

\\* Career growth and professional development opportunities.

\\* Supportive and collaborative work environment.

\\* Learning opportunities from experienced developers and engineers.

How to Apply

Interested candidates can send their updated resume along with relevant project details, GitHub profile, certifications, or portfolio links to:

cryoflametechnologies@gmail.com

Subject: Application for DevOps Engineer – Kalamassery

Preferred Attachments

\\* Updated Resume/CV

\\* GitHub Profile (Optional)

\\* Cloud/DevOps Certifications (If Any)

\\* Project Details (If Any)

Salary: ₹10,000 – ₹25,000 per month (Based on skills, certifications, project experience, and interview performance).

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: ₹10,000.00 - ₹25,000.00 per month

Benefits:

* Flexible schedule
* Paid time off
* Work from home

Work Location: In person

title: Desktop Service Engineer
description:
**Job Summary:**

We are looking for a Desktop Support Engineer to work in our laptop refurbishment unit. The candidate will handle checking, repairing, and preparing laptops for resale. Basic technical knowledge and willingness to learn are important for this role.

**Key Responsibilities:**

\\* Check and test used laptops and desktops.

\\* Install operating systems (Windows) and required software.

\\* Troubleshoot basic hardware and software issues.

\\* Replace or repair parts like RAM, SSD, battery, keyboard, etc.

\\* Clean and prepare laptops for resale.

\\* Maintain records of repaired systems.

\\* Support the team in daily refurbishment work.

**Requirements:**

\\* Basic knowledge of computers and laptop hardware.

\\* Diploma / ITI / Any technical qualification preferred.

\\* Freshers or candidates with 1–2 years experience can apply.

\\* Willing to work in Sriperumbudur.

\\* Hardworking and ready to learn.

**What We Offer:**

**\\* Free food and accommodation.**

\\* Stable job in a growing refurbishment business.

\\* Opportunity to learn laptop repair and technical skills.

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
**Responsibilities**

* Providing 24/7 DevOps Support and should be able to work in shifts.
* Setting up and maintaining infrastructure and on an on-going basis understanding the improvement areas for service reliability, scaling, availability etc
* Automating CI/CD process, platform services using open-source tools. Developing CICD pipelines & understanding CICD pipelines improvement areas to drive up speed of Service Delivery with reliability.
* Understanding the infrastructure footprint and various applications running on the servers.
* Driving automation and best practices for DevOps, Infra set up & maintenance. Automating day to day operational and deployment tasks using tools.
* Linux OS administration, Storage and File Systems, Backup and Restore.
* Monitoring infrastructure and running services, taking action on generated alerts.

**Skills Required**

* Experience in working with configuration management tools such as Puppet, Ansible, etc.
* Experience in CI/CD ecosystem - Jenkins, Github, etc.
* Experience deploying applications on public/private/hybrid cloud infrastructure - i.e., AWS, GCP, Azure, OpenStack, etc.
* Experience working in designing, deploying, and managing infrastructure with exposure to solution design and deployment of resilient, HA, Highly Scalable & DR architecture.
* Strong experience in server administration (Linux / Ubuntu Server).
* Docker containers and Kubernetes - Hands-on experience on writing Docker files and composor files. Experience in Kubernetes yaml files.
* Strong troubleshooting, debugging skills. Good performance diagnostic skills.
* Fair understanding of operating systems.
* Understanding of micro services, application servers, web servers, messaging servers, NOSQL and SQL database technologies.
* Strong experience in mentoring and training skilled engineers.

**Educational qualification:** BE, MCA / Any relevant degree or any DevOps related Certification.

**Experience:** 3 years to 10+ years

**Job Location:** Nagercoil

**About Us:**

Mafiree has served a lot of companies inside and outside the country for more than 17 years. It has provided all kinds of IT based services including developmental support, under which database administration & management becomes its core strength. Mafiree showcases a versatile experience in technologies like MSSQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL, PHP, JAVA, Android development, NO SQL etc.

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: ₹800,000.00 - ₹1,500,000.00 per year

Benefits:

* Health insurance
* Provident Fund
